name: Black Spear

active.name: Oathsworn Bond
active.effects: Consumes this item to initiate a {{fd|3.5}}-second [[cast time]] and a 3-second {{tip|channel}} afterwards from the user and the target allied champion, both becoming bound allies. The target is unable to act for 6 seconds after the channel's duration. Afterwards, the target becomes an ''Oathsworn''.

effects_structured.raw: Bind allied champion as Oathsworn after cast/channel; target incapacitated after channel.

simpleDescription: Kalista's spear that binds an Oathsworn Ally.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Oathsworn Bond is a unit-targeted ally bind with a 3.5-second cast time, a 3-second joint channel, and 6 seconds of target inability-to-act after the channel.
Player-visible behavior: this item is champion-scoped (Kalista and Sylas interactions) and consumes itself on successful bind.
Follow-up note: page-level notes include rebind/no-effect time-window nuances (for example post-3:00 no-effect casts with cooldown) that are intentionally documented for later runtime policy support.
